events.title: PM Summit 2026 - Day 1
events.description: PM Summit 2026 Day 1 - Virtual event with multiple sessions. Includes Opening Keynote at 9:00 AM ('The Future of Product' by CEO of ProductCo), Track Sessions at 10:30 AM (4 concurrent tracks to choose from), Lunch Break & Networking at 12:00 PM, Afternoon Sessions at 1:00 PM, and Day 1 Closing Panel at 4:00 PM. All times in Pacific Time (PT). Platform: Hopin (no download required). Access link: https://hopin.com/events/pmsummit2026. Login with: david.lee@example.com. Platform opens 30 minutes before the event starts (8:30 AM PT).

events.title: PM Summit 2026 - Day 2
events.description: PM Summit 2026 Day 2 - Virtual event continuation. Includes Day 2 Kickoff at 9:00 AM, Workshop Sessions (hands-on, interactive) at 9:30 AM, Lunch Break at 12:00 PM, Afternoon Sessions at 1:00 PM, Closing Keynote at 3:30 PM ('Building Products That Matter'), and Summit concludes at 4:30 PM. All times in Pacific Time (PT). Platform: Hopin. Access link: https://hopin.com/events/pmsummit2026. Login: david.lee@example.com. Platform opens 30 minutes before the event starts (8:30 AM PT). All sessions will be recorded and available for 90 days.
